'''鈭歞-ch-t''' ('''dachata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:linge|linge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:linge|linge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| dachata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dachatithi|dachatithi]] || [[word:dachatiji|dachatiji]] || [[word:dachatishi|dachatishi]] || [[word:dachati|dachati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachatuthuth|dachatuthuth]] || [[word:dachatujuj|dachatujuj]] || [[word:dachatushush|dachatushush]] || [[word:dachat|dachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachatuthu|dachatuthu]] || [[word:dachatuju|dachatuju]] || [[word:dachatushu|dachatushu]] || [[word:dachatu|dachatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachatufuth|dachatufuth]] || [[word:dachatufuj|dachatufuj]] || [[word:dachatufush|dachatufush]] || [[word:dachatuf|dachatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dachatethe|dachatethe]] || [[word:dachateje|dachateje]] || [[word:dachateshe|dachateshe]] || [[word:dachate|dachate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachatothoth|dachatothoth]] || [[word:dachatojoj|dachatojoj]] || [[word:dachatoshosh|dachatoshosh]] || [[word:dachat|dachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachatotho|dachatotho]] || [[word:dachatojo|dachatojo]] || [[word:dachatosho|dachatosho]] || [[word:dachato|dachato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachatofoth|dachatofoth]] || [[word:dachatofoj|dachatofoj]] || [[word:dachatofosh|dachatofosh]] || [[word:dachatof|dachatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dachat忙th忙|dachat忙th忙]] || [[word:dachat忙j忙|dachat忙j忙]] || [[word:dachat忙sh忙|dachat忙sh忙]] || [[word:dachat忙|dachat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachatathath|dachatathath]] || [[word:dachatajaj|dachatajaj]] || [[word:dachatashash|dachatashash]] || [[word:dachat|dachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachatatha|dachatatha]] || [[word:dachataja|dachataja]] || [[word:dachatasha|dachatasha]] || [[word:dachata|dachata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachatafath|dachatafath]] || [[word:dachatafaj|dachatafaj]] || [[word:dachatafash|dachatafash]] || [[word:dachataf|dachataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dachatasha|dachatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godachatasha|godachatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidachatasha|gokidachatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dachatn眉sha|dachatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godachatnkn眉sha|godachatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidachatn眉sha|gokidachatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dachatsh毛sha|dachatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godachatnksh毛sha|godachatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidachatsh毛sha|gokidachatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dachatrosha|dachatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godachatnkrosha|godachatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidachatrosha|gokidachatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dachatmusha|dachatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godachatnkmusha|godachatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidachatmusha|gokidachatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dachatsherasha|dachatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godachatnksherasha|godachatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidachatsherasha|gokidachatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dachatngasha|dachatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godachatnkngasha|godachatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidachatngasha|gokidachatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dachatyasha|dachatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godachatnkyasha|godachatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidachatyasha|gokidachatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dachatyamasha|dachatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godachatnkyamasha|godachatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidachatyamasha|gokidachatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dachatn眉sh毛sha|dachatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godachatnkn眉sh毛sha|godachatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidachatn眉sh毛sha|gokidachatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dachatn眉rosha|dachatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godachatnkn眉rosha|godachatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidachatn眉rosha|gokidachatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dachatn眉musha|dachatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godachatnkn眉musha|godachatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidachatn眉musha|gokidachatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dachatsh毛n眉sha|dachatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godachatnksh毛n眉sha|godachatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidachatsh毛n眉sha|gokidachatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dachatsh毛rosha|dachatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godachatnksh毛rosha|godachatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidachatsh毛rosha|gokidachatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dachatsh毛musha|dachatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godachatnksh毛musha|godachatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidachatsh毛musha|gokidachatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dachatron眉sha|dachatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godachatnkron眉sha|godachatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidachatron眉sha|gokidachatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dachatrosh毛sha|dachatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godachatnkrosh毛sha|godachatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidachatrosh毛sha|gokidachatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dachatromusha|dachatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godachatnkromusha|godachatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidachatromusha|gokidachatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dachatmun眉sha|dachatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godachatnkmun眉sha|godachatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidachatmun眉sha|gokidachatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dachatmush毛sha|dachatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godachatnkmush毛sha|godachatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidachatmush毛sha|gokidachatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dachatmurosha|dachatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godachatnkmurosha|godachatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidachatmurosha|gokidachatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dachat|dachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙ch忙t|d忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodachat|hodachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙ch忙t|hod忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodachat|hohodachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙ch忙t|hohod忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dachat|n眉dachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙ch忙t|n眉d忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dachat|n眉n眉dachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙ch忙t|n眉n眉d忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dachat|n茂dachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙ch忙t|n茂d忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dachat|n茂n茂dachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙ch忙t|n茂n茂d忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludachat|ludachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙ch忙t|lud忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludachat|luludachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙ch忙t|lulud忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidachat|lidachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙ch忙t|lid忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidachat|lilidachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙ch忙t|lilid忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodachat|kodachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙ch忙t|kod忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodachat|kokodachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙ch忙t|kokod忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedachat|kedachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙ch忙t|ked忙ch忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedachat|kekedachat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙ch忙t|keked忙ch忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
